mapper.select: select count(*) from board where status = 'Y'

select board_no, title, content, writer as empno, ename as writer, count, create_date, update_date, is_notice, board.status from board join emp on (empno = writer) where board.status = 'Y' order by board_no desc
mapper.insert: insert into board values(seq_board.nextval, #{title}, #{content}, #{empNo}, default, default, default, #{isNotice}, default )
mapper.select: select board_no, title, content, writer as empno, ename as writer, count, create_date, update_date, is_notice, board.status from board join emp on (empno = writer) where board.status = 'Y' and board_no = #{bId}
select reply_no, content, writer as empno, ename as writer, create_date, update_date, ref_board, reply.status from reply join emp on(writer = empno) where reply.status = 'Y' and ref_board = #{bId}

select count(*) from board join emp on (writer = empno) where board.status = 'Y'
and ename = #{value}
and title like '%' || #{value} || '%'
and content like '%' || #{value} || '%'
and (ename = #{value} or title like '%' || #{value} || '%' or content like '%' || #{value} || '%')

select board_no, title, content, writer as empno, ename as writer, count, create_date, update_date, is_notice, board.status from board join emp on(writer = empno) where board.status = 'Y'
and ename = #{value}
and ${condition} like '%${value}%'
and (ename = #{value} or title like '%${value}%' or content like '%${value}%')
order by board_no desc
mapper.insert: insert into reply values(seq_reply.nextval, #{content}, #{empNo}, default, default, #{refBoard}, default)
